memberdef.argsstring: (const char *src, size_t src_len, char *dst, size_t dst_size)
memberdef.name: ck_tokenizer_utf8_normalize_nfc

detaileddescription.para: Get the character index from byte offset.

simplesect.para: Character index, or total chars if offset beyond end

detaileddescription.para: Get the length of a UTF-8 character from its first byte.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes in character (1-4), or 0 for invalid

detaileddescription.para: Count UTF-8 characters in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Length in bytes, or -1 for null-terminated

detaileddescription.para: Write a Unicode code point as UTF-8.
Check if a byte sequence is valid UTF-8.

simplesect.para: true if all bytes form valid UTF-8

detaileddescription.para: Check if character is whitespace (Unicode White_Space property).
Get next UTF-8 character, return its code point.

parameterdescription.para: Output: length of character in bytes

simplesect.para: Unicode code point, or -1 on error

detaileddescription.para: Get the byte offset of the N-th character.

simplesect.para: Byte offset, or len if n >= char count

parameterdescription.para: Length in bytes, or -1 for null-terminated

simplesect.para: 0 if valid, position of first invalid byte otherwise
